sources.name: Awwwards
sources.why_it_matters: Tracks judged website craft and exposes current high-signal creative directions.

sources.name: The FWA
sources.why_it_matters: Strong signal for ambitious digital experience work and experimental campaign design.

sources.name: CSS Design Awards
sources.why_it_matters: Judges websites across UX, UI, and innovation, which makes it useful for balanced design review.

sources.name: SiteInspire
sources.why_it_matters: Useful for clustering patterns by type, style, and industry instead of only by winner status.

sources.name: Godly
sources.why_it_matters: Good modern reference set for strong site packaging, hero treatment, and layout energy.

sources.name: Land-book
sources.why_it_matters: Useful for scanning conversion surfaces, hero composition, and product marketing patterns.

sources.name: WCAG 2.2
sources.why_it_matters: Baseline accessibility contract for inclusive website and dashboard design.

sources.name: Nielsen Norman Group
sources.why_it_matters: Durable heuristics for usability, task clarity, and interaction quality.

sources.name: Apple Human Interface Guidelines
sources.why_it_matters: Strong reference for interface discipline, spatial clarity, and interaction polish.

sources.name: Material Design
sources.why_it_matters: Useful structured reference for components, layout systems, and app-like surfaces.
